untranslatable_reason: This signal requires cross-sectional ranking and quintile-based portfolio construction (long lowest volatility quintile, short highest volatility quintile). The allowed indicators list contains only single-stock technical indicators with no cross-sectional ranking, quintile sorting, or relative volatility comparison capabilities. hvol_20 measures absolute historical volatility on a single security, not relative rank across universe. A backtest engine would need explicit portfolio-level ranking functions, universe filtering, and dynamic quintile bucket assignment—none of which are expressible using the provided indicator set.
translation_notes: Signal requires: (1) universe-wide volatility ranking, (2) quintile bucket assignment based on relative rank, (3) portfolio-level long/short construction. Standard technical indicators cannot express cross-sectional comparisons needed for this factor-based strategy. Would require custom portfolio construction layer in backtest engine.
